issue_summary: Don't override non abstract methods that have an impl through other abstract methods in FilterAtomicReader and related classes.
javadoc_before:
/** Base class for filtering {@link Terms}
   *  implementations. */
javadoc_after:
/** Base class for filtering {@link Terms} implementations. *

NOTE: If the order of terms and documents is not changed, and if * these terms are going to be intersected with automata, you could consider * overriding {@link #intersect} for better performance. */
